caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain, dark background. She is wearing a light green, embroidered tunic with a decorative neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the lower-left corner of each frame, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. Her facial expression is attentive, and her mouth moves to articulate her words. Her hands shift positions slightly across the frames, moving from a raised posture on her right side to an open, gesturing position with both hands as the sequence progresses. The lighting is consistent, focusing on the woman while the surrounding environment remains dark and featureless.
